ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "car_make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car make */,
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car color */,
  "deposit_paid" REAL /* Deposit amount paid by the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of order (e.g., new, used, lease) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "sales_personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales personnel who handled the order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual delivery date of the car */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_car_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_make_id") REFERENCES car_makes ("car_make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_personnel_id") REFERENCES sales_personnel ("sales_personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_car_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("car_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_makes" (
  "car_make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car make */,
  "car_make_name" TEXT /* Name of the car make */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the car make is produced */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the car make */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the car make was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "car_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "car_make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car make */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the car model */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V8, V6) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car model */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the car model */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Drivetrain type (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code for the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered with the company */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_personnel" (
  "sales_personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales personnel */,
  "sales_personnel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales personnel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales personnel */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales personnel */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the sales personnel */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the sales personnel */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the sales personnel */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the sales personnel */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the sales personnel */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the sales personnel */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the sales personnel */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the sales personnel was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the sales personnel belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_personnel_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES sales_personnel ("sales_personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history entry */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being tracked */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the order at the time of change */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the order at the time of change */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date the order status or type was changed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_orders" (
  "customer_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order placed by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_orders_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
